name: legion-router
description: Legion's multi-model brain: delegate scoped tasks from the configured Claude role to the Codex and Cursor refs, then bring back a verified, metered diff. Ships `legion-delegate` for Codex, `legion-cursor` for Cursor Agent headless runs, generic GitHub issue intake via `legion-intake`, the `legion-router` loopback :8082 Anthropic-compatible metering proxy, plus the shared cost table and codex-json parser. One orchestrator, a legion of models.
